overallInterpretation: The artifact shows Vitest terminal output with 10 passing tests across two suites: DensityGrid (4 tests covering allocation, solid fill, empty fill, and side-length calculation) and marchingSquares (6 tests covering fully solid, fully empty, single-void, half-empty horizontal edge, world-coordinate mapping, and L-shaped void edge extraction). All 10 tests passed in 573ms. This matches the expected description of terminal output demonstrating density grid allocation, fill, and marching squares edge extraction for various patterns.

artifacts.interpretation: Vitest run of engine/tilemap/density.test.ts producing 10 passing tests (0 failures). The DensityGrid suite validates grid allocation and fill operations. The marchingSquares suite validates edge extraction for boundary cases (fully solid, fully empty, single void, half-empty, world coordinates, L-shaped void). Output is consistent with the command specified in demo-readme.json.
